Why homeowners choose us

No-nonsense tree work, done properly, done tidy

Fast, Reliable Response

Quick quotes and jobs often carried out within a day of instruction — no waiting weeks for a call back.

Spotless Cleanup

Every scrap of waste removed from site. We leave your garden tidier than we found it — every time.

Professional Equipment

Fully equipped for big and small jobs alike, from single-tree removals to full garden clearances.

Competitive Pricing

Honest, upfront pricing with no surprises — you really do get what you pay for.

Our services

Tree Care & Firewood, Handled Start to Finish

Tree Removal

Safe, complete removal of trees of any size, with the site left completely clear.

Tree Topping

Reducing height safely to manage overgrown or hazardous trees near your home.

Tree Thinning

Thinning out dense growth to improve light, health and the look of your garden.

Stump Removal & Grinding

Stubborn stumps ground out or removed completely, so you can get on with your project.

Firewood Supply

Quality seasoned firewood, sourced and supplied direct from our own tree work.

Garden Tree Maintenance

Ongoing pruning and upkeep to keep your garden's trees healthy and under control.

Fence Post Replacement

Damaged or rotten fence posts replaced cleanly as part of the wider job.

Tree Waste Removal

All cuttings, branches and debris fully removed — nothing left behind on your property.

Site Cleanup

A full sweep of the work area once the job's done, leaving your garden spotless.

Recent work

A Look at Jobs We've Completed

About us

A Family-Run Team, Built on Straight-Talking Service

Wid Men Tree Care is run by Tom and a small, experienced crew covering South and North Lanarkshire. No call centres, no upselling — just honest quotes, careful work, and a garden left cleaner than we found it.

From single tree removals to full stump grinding jobs and fence post replacements, we bring the right kit for the job every time, and we turn up when we say we will.
